name: deliver
description: Spec and ship AI agents — instruction design, PRD templates (with deterministic mermaid workflow/userflow consistency gate), prompt engineering, sprint planning, demo videos, visual assets, PPTX 4-engine router (mckinsey/hifidelity/html-qa/video), and build-execution scaffolding (harness-design, parallel-team worktrees, build-loop). Use when writing agent PRDs, designing agent instructions, planning context window budgets, setting agent OKRs, creating demo videos, building infographics, preparing presentation decks, or running an autonomous build loop.
